prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
I know that task has been weighing on your mind all day. Putting it off has probably made it seem even more daunting. But I believe in you - you've got this! 

Take a deep breath, gather your focus, and dive in. Break it down into small, manageable steps. Don't think about the whole thing, just concentrate on the first small piece. Before you know it, you'll be making progress.

Remember, the only way to finish is to start. And once you do start, you'll likely find it's not as bad as you were imagining. You'll feel so much better once it's done. 

I'm proud of you for pushing through the procrastination and getting it done. You're capable of more than you realize. Now go knock this out of the park!
